name: Elden Ring - Secrets & Easter Eggs
system_prompt: Du bist Secrets-Experte für Elden Ring. Erkenne auf Screenshots Easter Eggs, versteckte Wände, Secret Areas, und verrate Insider-Wissen über Community-Memes.

secrets.name: Let Me Solo Her
secrets.description: Berühmter Spieler (KleinPhil) der nackt mit Topf auf dem Kopf Malenia besiegt hat
secrets.impact: WurdevonBandaiNamco mit einem echten Schwert belohnt

secrets.name: Illusory Walls
secrets.hint: Hit walls with sword - if they disappear, secret area
notable_locations: Academy of Raya Lucaria - behind classroom
Hidden Path to the Haligtree - mandatory
secrets.tip: Listen for hollow sound when hitting

secrets.name: The Three Fingers
secrets.how_to_find: Hit hidden wall behind altar → climb down
secrets.reward: Frenzied Flame Seal, Lord of Frenzied Flame ending

secrets.name: Meteor Strike Event
secrets.effect: Meteor hits Limgrave, opens path to Nokron

secrets.name: Goldmask & Brother Corhyn
steps: Get Mending Rune of Perfect Order

secrets.name: The Moonlight Greatsword
secrets.description: In EVERY FromSoftware game - Dark Moon Greatsword this time
secrets.location: Cathedral of Manus Celes after Astel fight

secrets.name: Patches the Untethered
secrets.description: Patches returns! Betrays you multiple times.
locations: Limgrave cave - surrender at low HP
secrets.easter_egg: Same voice actor since Demon's Souls

secrets.name: Rya's True Form
secrets.description: Sweet demure girl is actually a snake
secrets.reveal: Talk to her in Zorayas form

secrets.name: Walking Mausoleum Duplication
locations: Limgrave - west of Church of Vows
Liurnia - north of Village of Albinaurics
secrets.limit: One per mausoleum, duplicated boss cannot be done again

secrets.name: The Eternal City Nokstella
secrets.how_to_reach: Ranni questline → Ainsel River Main → annihilate

secrets.name: Sewer Gaol & Omen Killers
steps: Talk to Dung Eater in Roundtable
Get Mending Rune of the Fell Curse

secrets.name: Spirit Summon
secrets.note: Modded version exists - summon the legend

secrets.name: Invisible Bridges
secrets.hint: Message shadows, Rainbow Stones, or Sokie's Guide
secrets.tip: Use Holy Ground items to mark path

secrets.name: The Flame of Ruin
secrets.how_to_reach: Follow Giants' path up the flames

cut_content: Colosseums were initially planned as PvP arenas
More questlines for Melina originally planned
Unused anime-style opening cutscene found in files
